data.name: Lead
data.value: Real-time environmental monitoring and waste management for the citizens of Bishkek.

data.name: FeaturesSubtitle
data.value: Three pillars of urban environmental management

data.name: Feature1Body
data.value: Continuous tracking of PM2.5, PM10, temperature and humidity from sensor stations across Bishkek.

data.name: Feature2Body
data.value: Real-time container fill levels, optimized collection routes, and operational analytics for city services.

data.name: Feature3Body
data.value: Report unauthorized dumpsites with photo and location, then watch as inspectors resolve them.

data.name: TelegramBody
data.value: Don't want to log in? Send dumpsite reports directly through our Telegram bot — description, photos, location, and you're done.
